title: PPIP - Dialog after Onboarding - Tap on Don't Share
feature: PPIP (Privacy & Personal Information Protection) - Onboarding Dialog
scenario: User taps "Don't Share" on PPIP dialog after onboarding and verifies the Share Data toggle is OFF in Account settings.
steps: Start app for first time, go through onboarding, tap "Continue as Guest" → PPIP dialog appears with "Help us improve your experience."
Tap "Don't Share", handle location permission (iOS only) → Dialog closes and Home screen is displayed.

Go to App Settings > General > Account → Verify "Share data" toggle is OFF with description explaining data sharing (device model, serial number, software version, feature usage; no personal info, not shared with third parties).
expected: "Share data" toggle is OFF with description explaining data sharing (device model, serial number, software version, feature usage; no personal info, not shared with third parties).
